{{Quote|Much of Acherin is open land. We only have three cities. Eluthan is the center of our culture. We fortified it heavily during the Clone Wars.|[[Raina Quill]]|<ref name="The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]''</ref>}}
'''Eluthan''' was an ancient walled [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Acherin]], built on a plateau. It was known for its strength as well as its beauty. The city was built with [[Color/Legends|gray]], blue, and bronze stones that awed many who looked upon it for the first time.

Over the next year after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Eluthan was used as a base by those who resisted against the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. However after nearly a year of fighting, the Empire was too strong. The leader of the resistance, [[Toma (resistance leader)|Toma]], informed the Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Riwwel]] of their surrender, but Riwwel wouldn't hear it, and he ordered the bombing of the ancient and sacred city. It was left in ruins, leaving its citizens to squabble between themselves and the neighboring city of [[Sood]].

A natural phenomenon could be seen from Eluthan called the [[flames of Eluthan]].
